rows.scripted: Oh... hush now... I was listening...
rows.heard: Oh, hush now. I was listening.

rows.scripted: Soldier down! Cover that body, I'm going to them!
rows.heard: Soldier down! Cover that body! I'm going to him!

rows.scripted: Last magazine. Time to make every answer count.
rows.heard: Last Magazine. Time to make every answer count.

rows.scripted: I see the opening. Let me have it.
rows.heard: I see the opening. Let me have it.

rows.scripted: Keep their eyes up front. I'll handle the surprise.
rows.heard: Keep they eyes up front. I'll handle the surprise.

rows.scripted: Stay close to that runner. Pride is heavy when you are carrying it.
rows.heard: Stay close to that runner. Pride is heavy when you are carrying it.

rows.scripted: CLOAK'S GONE! I NEED COVER!
rows.heard: Cloak's gone! I need cover!

rows.scripted: Mm. Those eyes are better than I expected.
rows.heard: Those eyes are better than I expected.

rows.scripted: Cloak is dry. No more magic until it charges.
rows.heard: Cloak is dry. No more magic until it charges.

rows.scripted: Easy now... even the air is listening.
rows.heard: Easy now. Even the air is listening.

rows.scripted: Now, let's become a rumor.
rows.heard: Now, let's become a Roma.

rows.scripted: Keep looking forward, darling. That's where I used to be.
rows.heard: Keep looking forward, darling. That's where I used to be.

rows.scripted: Cloak is back. Let's try subtlety again.
rows.heard: Cloak is back. Let's try subtlety again.

rows.scripted: All right, darlings. Let's go make ourselves difficult to find.
rows.heard: Alright darlings, let's go make ourselves difficult to find.

rows.scripted: Check your corners. I'll check the places corners try to hide.
rows.heard: Check your corners. I'll check the places corners try to hide.

rows.scripted: I'm down! Don't you mourn me while I'm still talking!
rows.heard: I'm down. Don't you mind me while I'm still talking.

rows.scripted: That is our capture. Clean work, babies. Almost elegant.
rows.heard: That is our capture. Clean work, babies. Almost elegant.

rows.scripted: Flag is down! Clear the ground around it!
rows.heard: Flag is down. Clear the ground around it.

rows.scripted: I've got their colours. Well, won't they be embarrassed.
rows.heard: I've got they colors, but won't they be embarrassed?

rows.scripted: GRENADE! MOVE, BABIES, MOVE!
rows.heard: Grenade! Move babies, move!

rows.scripted: Little gift going out. Don't crowd the doorway.
rows.heard: Lil' Gif goin' out, don't crowd the doorway.

rows.scripted: I hear you, baby. Hold on, I'm coming.
rows.heard: I hear you, baby. Hold on. I'm coming.

rows.scripted: I'll hold here. Nothing passes without introducing itself.
rows.heard: I'll hold here. Nothing passes without introducing itself.

rows.scripted: This corner and I are acquainted now.
rows.heard: This corner and I are acquainted now.

rows.scripted: Quiet like this usually means somebody's planning something foolish.
rows.heard: Quiet like this usually means somebody's planning something foolish.

rows.scripted: Mm-hm. Take your time. Trouble always gets impatient first.
rows.heard: Mm-hmm. Take your time. Trouble always gets impatient first.

rows.scripted: Odessa Broussard, baby. You keep your head down, and Miss Dee will keep the other side guessing.
rows.heard: Odessa Bruce sod, baby. You keep your head down, and Miss D will keep the other side guessing.

rows.scripted: Mm. You should've watched the quiet side.
rows.heard: Hmm. You should have watched the quiet side.

rows.scripted: There you go. Lie still for Miss Dee.
rows.heard: There you go. Lie still for Miss D.

rows.scripted: All that noise, and still you missed the important part.
rows.heard: All that noise is still your misty important part.

rows.scripted: Two down. They came together; seemed rude to separate them.
rows.heard: Tilt out, they came together, seemed rude to separate them.

rows.scripted: I remembered you. Aren't you touched?
rows.heard: I remembered you. All that you touched.

rows.scripted: Just me, then. All right. I've had quieter evenings.
rows.heard: Just me then. All right. I've had quieter evenings.

rows.scripted: I'm hurt. Still thinking, though. That's the dangerous part.
rows.heard: I'm hurt. Still thinking, though. That's the dangerous part.

rows.scripted: I'm moving. Try not to announce it for me.
rows.heard: I'm moving. Try not to announce it for me.

rows.scripted: On my way, sugar. Quiet feet.
rows.heard: On my way, sugar. Quiet feet.

rows.scripted: One clean line. That is all it takes.
rows.heard: One clean line. That is all it takes.

rows.scripted: Hold still... just a little longer.
rows.heard: Hold still just a little longer.

rows.scripted: Changing magazines. Keep them entertained.
rows.heard: Changing magazines. Keep them entertained.

rows.scripted: DRY! I need five seconds and a small miracle!
rows.heard: Dry! I need five seconds and a small miracle!

rows.scripted: Thank you, baby. Now point me toward the rude one.
rows.heard: Thank you, baby. Now point me toward the rude one.

rows.scripted: Stay with me, sweetheart. Breathe first; complain later.
rows.heard: Stay with me, sweetheart. Breathe first. Complain later.

rows.scripted: Aircraft overhead. Find something solid and become fond of it.
rows.heard: Aircraft Overhead. Find something solid and become fond of it.

rows.scripted: Armor on the lane. Big, loud, and very sure of itself.
rows.heard: Alma on the lane, big, loud, and very sure of itself.

rows.scripted: Cloak shimmer, near the wall. Oh, somebody thinks they're subtle.
rows.heard: Cloak shimmer near the wall. Oh, somebody thinks they subtle.

rows.scripted: Two riflemen, left side. Walking like nobody told them.
rows.heard: Two riflemen, left side, walking like nobody told them.

rows.scripted: I'm pinned! Put something loud in their direction!
rows.heard: I'm pinned. Put something loud in their direction.

rows.scripted: They've got my position! Break their sightline!
rows.heard: They've got my position. Break their sight line.

rows.scripted: OUT! OUT OF THE VEHICLE, NOW!
rows.heard: Out! Out of the vehicle now!

rows.scripted: This machine is coming apart! Ease her back!
rows.heard: This machine is coming apart! Ease her back!

rows.scripted: Scoot over. Miss Dee is riding.
rows.heard: Scoot over, Miss D is riding.
